PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Dec-29-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The court noted that Examiner's notes were e-mailed to counsel on August 3, 2021 and that nothing was filed to address the issues ever since. The Petition for Spousal Property is ordered off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
